title: High Income Recession-Proof  HVAC Services Business
supportTraining: The new owners will receive 2 weeks of upfront training from operational and marketing experts. Employee training resources are also provided. Ongoing training opportunities for the owners and employees are provided to set up the new owner for success. The seller is committed to a smooth transition
description:
ESTABLISHED HVAC FRANCHISE - 26-YEAR TRACK RECORD WITH PROVEN FINANCIAL PERFORMANCE

FINANCIAL PERFORMANCE METRICS:
• Annual Revenue: $2.64 Million (2025)
• Net Income: $571,000
• Net Profit Margin: 21.6% (significantly above industry average of 10-15%)
• Asset Value: $326,000+ included in sale (vehicles and equipment)
• Investment Multiple: 2.3x net income at $1.3M asking price

OPERATIONAL ADVANTAGES:
• 26-year operational history demonstrating business stability and market resilience
• Established customer database across residential and commercial segments
• Recurring revenue component through maintenance contracts providing predictable cash flow
• Franchise model with documented systems and procedures reducing operational risk
• Fully staffed operation with experienced technician team eliminating hiring challenges

MARKET POSITION:
• Located in Tyler, Texas (Smith County) - growing East Texas market
• Recession-resistant industry serving essential HVAC needs
• No inventory requirements or retail buildout costs
• Home-based operation capability reducing overhead expenses
• National franchise brand recognition providing competitive advantage over independent operators

SCALABILITY FACTORS:
• Executive management model allowing owner oversight without daily technical involvement
• Established team structure supporting growth initiatives
• Market expansion opportunities in underserved regional areas
• Additional service line potential within existing customer base
• Documented processes enabling systematic growth

FINANCING AVAILABLE:
• Pre-approved SBA financing option with 10% down payment requirement
• Asset-backed transaction including vehicle fleet and equipment package
• Strong financial history supporting lending qualification

This turnkey operation offers immediate cash flow generation from day one with proven systems, established market presence, and significant growth potential for the right buyer seeking a data-driven investment opportunity in the essen
